UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowIndicatorG: If disabled, the visual-sound effect indicators that represent gunfire and explosions will not be displayed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowIndicatorM: If disabled, the visual-sound effect indicators that represent movement(player running, swimming, gliding, wildlife etc) in the world will not be displayed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowIndicatorV: If disabled, the visual-sound effect indicators that represent vehicles moving in the world will not be displayed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowVisualSoun: If set to No, all Visual-Sound Effect indicators are disabled.

UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowHUDMessage: Determines if HUD Messages from the HUD Message Device are visible on the player HUD.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowCraftingRe: Determines if crafting resources are visible on the HUD.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowGoldResour: Determines if gold resources are displayed in the HUD.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowInteractio: Determines if interaction prompts are visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowMetalResou: Determines if metal resources are displayed in the HUD.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowStoneResou: Determines if stone resources are displayed in the HUD.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowContextual: Determines if the Contextual Controls are displayed (Shows on left when various systems want to show their keybinds to the user, e.g. Input Triggers, Vehicles, Weapons, etc).
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowHUDInfoBox: Determines if the HUD info box is visible.
Determines if the LLM conversation UI is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowStormNotif: Determines if the Storm Notifications are visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowTeamInfo.D: Determines if the Team info is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowBackpackKe: Determines if the backpack key is visible.
Determines if the build menu is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowEquippedIt: Determines if the info for the equipped item is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowPickupStre: Determines if the item pickup stream is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowMapScorebo: Determines if the map/scoreboard prompt is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowMinimap.De: Determines if the minimap is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowPlayerCoun: Determines if the number of players currently in the game is displayed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowEliminatio: Determines if the number of players eliminated is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowPlayerActi: Determines if the player action alerts are visible. These include the messages for when players get eliminated, when players are down and more.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowPlayerInve: Determines if the player inventory is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowHealth.Des: Determines if the player's health bar is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowHealthNumb: Determines if the player's health numbers are visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowShields.De: Determines if the player's shield bar is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowShieldNumb: Determines if the player's shield numbers are visible.
Determines if the player's sprint bar is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowReticleSta: Determines if the reticle status (e.g. "No Ammo") is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowRoundDetai: Determines if the round details are visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowRoundTimer: Determines if the round timer is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowStormTimer: Determines if the storm timer is displayed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowTextChat.D: Determines if the text chat is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowTextChatPr: Determines if the text chat prompt is visible.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowWoodResour: Determines if wood resources are displayed in the HUD.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.EnabledDuringP: Determines the game phases during which the device will be enabled. Pre-Game includes all phases prior to the Game starting (the waiting for players lobby on Featured Islands and the Game Start Countdown).
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.DisplayReticle: Determines the type of reticle that is displayed on the player's screen.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowBattlePass: Determines what degree of the Battle Pass experience bar UI is visible.
Determines which Class is affected by this device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.AffectedTeam.D: Determines which Team is affected by this device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_C.Disable.Descripti: Disables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Disable.Descri: Disables the device, removing it's effects on the HUD.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_C.Enable.Descriptio: Enables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Enable.Descrip: Enables the device to hide or show selected HUD elements.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.CustomQuickbar: How much padding to add between the Custom Quickbar Slots
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Custom Quickba: How the custom Quickbar slots should be stacked: horizontally or vertically
How to layout the keybindings in relation to the quickbar slots when using custom Quickbar Widget
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowIndicatorL: If disabled, the visual-sound effect indicators that represent chests in the world will not be displayed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowIndicatorH: If disabled, the visual-sound effect indicators that represent players healing in the world will not be displayed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.InvertAffected: NO: The device only affects the Affected Class. YES: The device affects all classes except the Affected Class.
NO: The device only affects the Affected Team. YES: The device affects all classes except the Affected Team.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_C.Reset Affected Cl: Resets Affected Class to the original Affected Class on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Reset Affected: Resets Affected Class to the original Affected Class.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_C.Reset Affected Te: Resets Affected Team to the original Affected Team on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Reset Affected: Resets Affected Team to the original Affected Team.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Quickbar Slot: Set a custom Widget Blueprint for the HUD to use for Quickbar Slots
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.PlayerInfoWidg: Set a custom Widget Blueprint for the HUD to use when showing player status
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.EquippedItemIn: Set a custom Widget Blueprint for the HUD to use when showing the equipped item info
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.OverrideTouchC: Set a custom Widget Blueprint that represents a HUD layout to show players in this island
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowHUD.Descri: Setting to NO hides the HUD by default. Set individual elements to visible below.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Priority.Descr: The priority of the effects of this device. A higher priority will override the effects on a specific HUD element from a lower priority device. Only the first relevant device from each priority group will be considered.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowVehicleSpe: Toggles whether to show vehicle HUD
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ShowVehicleDam: Toggles whether to show vehicle health
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_C.Update Affected C: Updates Affected Class to the instigator's Class on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Update Affecte: Updates Affected Class to the instigator's Class.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_C.Update Affected T: Updates Affected Team to the instigator's Team on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.Update Affecte: Updates Affected Team to the instigator's Team.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyActiveSp: Use to change the position of the Active Speaker list on screen
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.bModifyCustomQ: Use to change the position of the Custom Quickbar widget on screen.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.bModifyTextCha: Use to change the position of the Text Chat widget on screen. Text Chat can only be repositioned within the bounds of the screen.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.VehicleDamageS: Vehicle Damage Stats UI Layout Alignment
Vehicle Damage Stats UI Layout Anchor
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyBuildMen: Whether to modify or not the layout of the Build Menu.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyCrafting: Whether to modify or not the layout of the Crafting Resources.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyEquipped: Whether to modify or not the layout of the EquippedItem widget.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyHealthLa: Whether to modify or not the layout of the Health Widget.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyPlayerIn: Whether to modify or not the layout of the Player Inventory.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyTeamInfo: Whether to modify or not the layout of the Team Info.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyBackpack: Whether to modify or not the layout of the backpack key.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifyMinimapL: Whether to modify or not the layout of the minimap.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_HUDController_V2_C.ModifySprintBa: Whether to modify or not the layout of the sprint bar.
